rulings.Case Title: PAVEL ZINCHIK VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 20, 2017, line 1. PETITIONER PAVEL ZINCHIK'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate continued to November 1, 2017 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BERTHA P PANG VS. DOUGLAS BAIRD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 20, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS BAIRD'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTIAN DOEGL ET AL VS. SANDRALINE CEDERWALL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants And Cross Complainants Sandraline Cederwall And Stephen Barrager Individually And As Trustees Of Their Respective Trusts For Leave To File Second Amended Cross Complaint And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of John S Siamas In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 20, 2017, line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANTS SANDRALINE CEDERWALL, STEPHEN BARRAGER'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Cross Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint shall file an amended cross-complaint as follows (1) make non substantive clerical corrections; (2) add Robert Elman as Cross-Defendant in causes of action for Breach of Fiduciary Duty and Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress; (3) delete fourth and fifths causes of action and related prayers; (4) supplemental allegations in paragraphs 13, 18, and 29. (Motion 5:11-20). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ET AL VS. PETER D. BRATIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 20, 2017, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, ADAM HASSETT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT continued to November 7, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of reply. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than October 20, 2017 by 9:30 a.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Documents And Testimony Of Richard Grabstein And The Appointment Of A Discovery Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 20, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT ANGELIQUE TAVARES'S Motion To Compel Documents And Testimony Of Richard Grabstein And The Appointment Of A Discovery Referee GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to Requests for Production 1-9 and 11-26, objections are overruled and responses to be provided within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Motion is denied as to Request for Production 10, objections are sustained. Motion to Compel responses to deposition questions is GRANTED. The Motion for Appointment of referee is denied without prejudice. If a renewed motion for appointment of a discovery referee is filed parties are ordered to meet and confer prior to the filing of the motion in person after exchanging names of at least two proposed referees. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $3,310.00 against plaintiffs and their counsel. = (501/REQ)
